papers.title: A multi-agent system for automating scientific discovery
papers.project_value: closed-loop multi-agent hypothesis generation, data analysis, and lab-in-the-loop validation

papers.title: Accelerating scientific discovery with Co-Scientist
papers.project_value: hypothesis tournament, critique/refinement, and test-time compute allocation

papers.title: An AI system to help scientists write expert-level empirical software
papers.project_value: ERA-style search over analysis code and feature/model variants using explicit quality metrics

highest_priority: Build benchmark-driven analysis search over feature families, source/cycle splits, residualization controls, and weak-label targets.
guardrail: Use agentic systems to rank and test hypotheses, not to emit validated battery-mechanism claims without source-balanced controls, manual ROI/front QC, and electrochemical consistency checks.
